content:
I am a seasoned backend engineer working at the intersection of AI/ML, Cybersecurity and large-scale systems.
My interests include Artificial Intelligence (Natural Language Processing, Knowledge Representation, Agent collaboration, Planning), Machine Learning, Information Retrieval (Search), Distributed Systems, etc.
I live and work in San Francisco bay area.
title: About

content:
My research was primarily in the areas of Artifical Intelligence (NLP, Planning, Agent collaboration), Information Retrieval, and Semantic Web.
See DBLP.
Publication List # K. Thirunarayan and T. Immaneni, “A Coherent Query Language for XML,” Journal of Intelligent Information Systems, 2009. PDF K. Thirunarayan and T. Immaneni, “An XML-based Approach to Handling Tables in Documents,” Journal of Intelligent Systems, Vol. 17(1-3), January 2008. T. Immaneni and K. Thirunarayan, “A Unified Approach to Retrieving Web Documents and Semantic Web Data,” Proceedings of the 4th European Semantic Web Conference, June 2007. PDF T. Immaneni and K. Thirunarayan, “Hybrid Retrieval from the Unified Web,” Proceedings of the 22nd Annual ACM Symposium on Applied Computing, Semantic Web and Applications Track, pp. 1346-1350, March 2007. PDF K. Thirunarayan, T. Immaneni and M. Shaik, “Selecting Labels for News Document Clusters,” Proceedings of the 12th International Conference on Applications of Natural Language to Information Systems, June 2007. PDF K. Thirunarayan, T. Immaneni and M. Shaik, “Dependence of Binary Associations on Co-occurrence Granularity in News Documents,” IKE 2008 K. Thirunarayan and T. Immaneni, “Flexible Querying of XML Documents,” Proceedings of the 16th International Symposium on Methodologies for Intelligent Systems, LNAI Vol. 4203, pp. 198-207, September 2006. PDF K. Thirunarayan and T. Immaneni, “Formalizing and Querying Heterogeneous Documents with Tables,” Proceedings of the 2nd Indian International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, pp. 769-778, December 2005. PDF D. Ravishankar, K. Thirunarayan and T. Immaneni, “A Modular Approach to Document Indexing and Semantic Search,” Proceedings of the IASTED International Conference on Web Technologies, Applications and Services, pp. 165-170, July 2005. PDF T. Immaneni and M. T. Cox, “GTrans: An Application for Managing Mixed-Initiative Collaborative Planning during Emergency Response Situations,” Proceedings of the 2004 International Symposium on Collaborative Technologies and Systems, pp. 121-126, January 2004.
